examples: She has loyally and unselfishly spent every day at her husband's side.
While staying in the village, James unselfishly shared whatever he had with the villagers without asking for anything in return.
God wants you to learn to love and serve others unselfishly.
We remember forever the many heroes who unselfishly gave their lives that day trying to save the fallen.
As the Glens took over after the break, Clarke levelled on 57th minute after being unselfishly set up by Andrew Waterworth.
